task_completion.description: Enable minification for the release build type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the app-level build.gradle.kts file showing 'isMinifyEnabled = true' inside the 'release' block of the 'buildTypes' configuration.

task_completion.description: Enable resource shrinking for the release build type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the app-level build.gradle.kts file showing 'isShrinkResources = true' inside the 'release' block of the 'buildTypes' configuration.

task_completion.description: Add ProGuard rule to preserve all classes in the data.model package
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of proguard-rules.pro showing a rule like '-keep class com.example.weathernow.data.model.** { *; }'.

task_completion.description: Add ProGuard rule to preserve fields annotated with @SerializedName
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of proguard-rules.pro showing a rule to keep class members annotated with SerializedName, such as '-keepclassmembers class * { @com.google.gson.annotations.SerializedName <fields>; }'.

task_completion.description: Add ProGuard rule to preserve the WeatherApiService interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of proguard-rules.pro showing a rule like '-keep class com.example.weathernow.data.api.WeatherApiService { *; }' or '-keep interface com.example.weathernow.data.api.WeatherApiService { *; }'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project builds successfully using assembleRelease
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal screenshot showing the execution of './gradlew assembleRelease' and ending with a 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' message.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual build.gradle.kts and proguard-rules.pro files in an IDE or text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The files are seen open in Android Studio, VS Code, or a terminal-based editor (like nano/vim), not just mocked in a standalone text file.

integrity.description: The build command was actually executed in a terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal shows genuine Gradle execution output (e.g., task execution list, build time, daemon status) rather than just a manually typed 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' string.

integrity.description: The agent worked in the correct WeatherNow project directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal prompt or IDE file explorer shows the path '/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherNow'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherNow. The project uses Kotlin DSL (build.gradle.kts). To enable minification and resource shrinking in AGP 8.1.1 with Kotlin DSL, the properties must be 'isMinifyEnabled = true' and 'isShrinkResources = true'. The ProGuard rules must target the package 'com.example.weathernow.data.model', the annotation 'SerializedName' (typically 'com.google.gson.annotations.SerializedName'), and the interface 'com.example.weathernow.data.api.WeatherApiService'.
